_comment: Provenance + licensing for every visual/audio asset, mirroring source-register.json. No asset ships without an entry here and a confirmed commercial-use license. AI-generated art is auxiliary and must record its model, prompt reference, and a human confirmation of ownership/commercial terms.

assets.license: PENDING — confirm ByteDance/Seedream commercial-use + output-ownership terms before ship
assets.usage: Salón room — flooring module, before state (Phaser room texture)
assets.limitations: Auxiliary AI art. Not a source of truth. Must be visually consistent with the locked style bible and register-aligned with its after-state.

assets.usage: Salón room — flooring module, after state (Phaser room texture)
assets.limitations: Must be a pixel-aligned edit of salon-floor-before (only the floor changes).
